description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, light wood and white exterior walls, and is surrounded by manicured hedges and tall, slender trees. The front of the bungalow includes a double driveway with two cars, a central walkway, and a main entrance flanked by greenery. At the rear, there is a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, a sunbathing area with lounge chairs, and an outdoor dining set under an umbrella. The layout is open, with visible interior spaces and a central courtyard that brings natural light into the home. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wood and white exterior, a pool, and landscaped gardens. The design features open spaces and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central walkway, driveway with two cars, and a clear view of the pool and backyard landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, windowed facade, privacy hedges, and the outdoor dining area near the pool.
description_view_2: Rear view with the driveway, two cars, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping leading up to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing grouped windows, hedges, and the pool area with sun loungers and umbrella.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
